name: Bermuda High School for Girls (BHS)
description: Bermuda's leading independent school for girls, offering the International Baccalaureate (IB) Diploma Programme for Grades 11–12 and the IB Middle Years Programme. Located in Pembroke. Strong university placement record in the US and UK. Annual fees approximately $20,000–23,000 per year. Applications typically open September–November for the following academic year — apply well in advance. Ages 5–18.
